label: High stability, High fertility
examples: ZFC set theory; Peano arithmetic (PA); Computation (Turing/λ); Full 9-assumption substrate; Reaction-diffusion (Turing)

label: High stability, Low fertility
examples: First-order logic (FOL); Presburger arithmetic; Decidable fragment of FOL; Substrate without CD2; Coupled oscillator (Kuramoto)

label: Low stability, High fertility
examples: Our universe; Cyclic universe (bounce); Super-fertile universe (hypothetical); Category theory (ETCS); Substrate without EC1

label: Low stability, Low fertility
examples: Substrate without SR1; Lorenz strange attractor; Logistic map (r=3.8)
